feed.title: Chaitanya Patil
feed.subtitle: Portfolio updates, projects, and engineering insights.

entry.title: StreetBite — Street Food Discovery Platform
entry.summary: Full-stack street food discovery platform with vendor loyalty, community forums, and real-time geolocation.

entry.title: Focus Arena — Gamified Productivity RPG
entry.summary: RPG-inspired productivity app with quest systems, boss battles, and guild raids.

entry.title: ScamSentry — AI-Powered Scam Detection
entry.summary: Real-time scam detection engine analyzing URLs, emails, and phone numbers using ML classifiers.
